01   Profile

Exploring the Code

I am a Software Engineering student with a solid foundation in C programming and growing expertise in web development and Python. I believe in mastering core programming concepts before building scalable, efficient applications on top of that foundation.

My approach centers on clean code, logical problem-solving, and continuously expanding my technical skills. I am committed to becoming a professional full-stack software developer who writes optimized, maintainable code at scale.

Currently focused on: structured programming in C, frontend web development with HTML/CSS/JavaScript, Python fundamentals, and foundational data structures and algorithms.
